channel.title: Altorientalische Forschungen
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Altorientalische Forschungen

item.title: An Inscribed Kassite Weight from Kermānšāh Province, Western Iran

item.title: Ezinan’s Seven Children

item.description: Article by Thomas Richter DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/aofo-2024-0020

item.title: Johannes Friedrich – Zur Einleitung
